# Control Mapping

## Purpose
This document maps audit and control requirements to the documentation and evidence that demonstrate coverage.

## Guidance for completion
Use one row per requirement or checklist item. The primary document should be the main source that addresses the requirement. Supporting documents should point to additional evidence or context. Status should reflect current completeness, and Gap / Action should capture any remaining remediation work.

| Audit Area | Checklist Item | Expected Evidence | Primary Doc | Supporting Doc | Owner | Status | Gap / Action |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Strategy & Business Alignment |  |  |  |  |  | Not Started / Drafted / Complete |  |
| Architecture & Platform Design |  |  |  |  |  | Not Started / Drafted / Complete |  |
| Data Management & Compliance |  |  |  |  |  | Not Started / Drafted / Complete |  |
| Program Governance & Delivery |  |  |  |  |  | Not Started / Drafted / Complete |  |
| Cutover & Readiness |  |  |  |  |  | Not Started / Drafted / Complete |  |
| Risk Management |  |  |  |  |  | Not Started / Drafted / Complete |  |
| Benefits Realization |  |  |  |  |  | Not Started / Drafted / Complete |  |
